mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM question WHERE question_id IN
#{questionId}
SELECT * FROM question ORDER BY question_id
SELECT * FROM question WHERE subject = #{subject} ORDER BY question_id
SELECT q.* FROM question q INNER JOIN paper_question pq ON q.question_id = pq.question_id WHERE pq.paper_id = #{paperId} ORDER BY pq.question_order
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO question (question_type, subject, content, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, correct_answer, score, difficulty, analysis, creator_id) VALUES (#{questionType}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{optionA}, #{optionB}, #{optionC}, #{optionD}, #{correctAnswer}, #{score},
#{difficulty, javaType=com.exam.model.enums.Difficulty, jdbcType=VARCHAR} 'MEDIUM' , #{analysis}, #{creatorId})
mapper.update:
UPDATE question SET question_type = #{questionType}, subject = #{subject}, content = #{content}, option_a = #{optionA}, option_b = #{optionB}, option_c = #{optionC}, option_d = #{optionD}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, score = #{score}, difficulty =
#{difficulty, javaType=com.exam.model.enums.Difficulty, jdbcType=VARCHAR} 'MEDIUM' , analysis = #{analysis} WHERE question_id = #{questionId}
